texto: At the same time we see the phenomenon of successful women adopting the standards of men with a vengeance. Will women's march to power ascendancy, won against all odds, mean that they too will choose to flaunt their preferences for red meat, animal skin, sport hunting, and even bullfighting? As women are swelling the ranks of biomedical science, many have adopted the practice of animal experimentation. Will animal exploitation become the ultimate symbol of equality with the white male?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Maria Comninou que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “At the same time we see the phenomenon of successful women adopting the standards of men with a v…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre sucesso, animal-rights, animals, com foco em termino e animals.
